Order Request

Welcome to the Ordering Portal

LYNX DISTRIBUTION GROUP · ARIZONA LICENSED RETAILERS ONLY

  • 1
    Choose On-Premise or Off-Premise Use the toggle at the top of the catalog to select your account type (retail vs. bar/restaurant) so you see the correct pricing tier.
  • 2
    Add items to your cart Browse the catalog, select case or bottle quantities, and add the products you want.
  • 3
    Fill out your details Enter your business name and choose how you'd like us to reach you — email, phone call, or text message.
  • 4
    We confirm & schedule delivery Our team will verify your license and reach out to confirm the order and schedule delivery to your location.
Payment: First orders are Cash or Check. Once established, you can pay via Fintech.
